chips.text: glucose or HbA1c reviewed if ordered
pelvic examination documented if clinically appropriate
fluid management advice documented if discussed
pelvic floor context reviewed if relevant
menstrual or menopausal context reviewed if relevant

speed_preset.text: pelvic examination documented if clinically appropriate
glucose or HbA1c reviewed if ordered

history_draft.text: Patient presents with urinary frequency/urgency. [Nocturia]. [Urge incontinence]. [Dysuria]. [Haematuria]. [Fluid/caffeine context].

exam_prompts.text: Documented if assessed or measured. Abdominal examination documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Blood pressure documented.

investigation_options.text: Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Urinalysis reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Urine culture reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Glucose/HbA1c reviewed.

plan_options.text: Bladder training/fluid advice documented if discussed.

clinical_blockers: The workflow does not encode adult female eligibility, incontinence classification, infection status, voiding dysfunction, recurrence, or referral qualifiers.

Urinary-retention negatives, symptom progression, glucose or HbA1c, blood pressure, previous records, generic plan, safety-netting, fixed intervals, PRN wording, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, medicine or procedure selection, referral urgency, and exact follow-up timing remain clinician responsibilities.
